title: PreMortemOutput
description: PreMortem stage output: failure-oriented risk analysis. Empty risks array is acceptable for trivial plans but suspicious for plans with 4+ nodes.

recommendation.description: Top-level go/no-go. ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN means a human must approve before any execution.

description.description: What could go wrong, in concrete terms

severity.description: high = blocker if mitigation fails. medium = costly if it materializes. low = annoying but recoverable.

affected_nodes.description: Which predicted nodes this risk applies to
